relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Phoebe is commended as sister and deacon of Cenchreae.
She is to be received worthily and supported as one who has protected many.
Prisca and Aquila are greeted as coworkers in Messiah.
They risked their own necks for Paul’s life, receiving thanks from nations’ assemblies.
Their house is an assembly, and Epaenetus is firstfruit.
Mary’s much labor is honored.
Andronicus and Junia are kin, fellow prisoners, and notable among apostles.
Ampliatus is beloved in the Lord.
Urbanus and Stachys are honored in coworking and love.
Apelles is approved in Messiah, and Aristobulus’ household is greeted.
Herodion and Narcissus’ household in the Lord are greeted.
Tryphaena, Tryphosa, and Persis show women’s labor in the Lord.
Rufus and his mother, mother also to Paul, are greeted.
A circle of siblings is named and held.
More holy ones and households are gathered into greeting.
Holy affection circulates among the assemblies.
Watch those creating divisions and stumbling against the teaching.
Smooth religious speech can deceive innocent hearts.
Be wise toward good and unmixed toward harm.
The Divine of peace crushes the Accuser under the community’s feet.
Timothy and Paul’s kin send greeting.
Tertius the scribe greets in the Lord.
Gaius hosts Paul and the whole assembly; Erastus and Quartus greet.
A later manuscript tradition repeats the grace blessing.
The strengthening Divine reveals the long-hidden mystery through Jesus Messiah.
The mystery is now made known to all nations for obedience of trust.
Glory belongs to the only wise Divine through Jesus Messiah into the ages.

contemplative_note: Romans ends not as abstraction but as a living network: Phoebe, Prisca, Junia, house assemblies, coworkers, patrons, scribes, mothers, siblings, and the mystery opened to all nations.
